scripts.postinstall: R=firefox-dev; out=firefox.tar.gz; mkdir -p $R && rm -rf $R/* && mkdir -p $R/profile && wget -O $R/$out 'https://download.mozilla.org/?product=firefox-devedition-latest-ssl&os=linux64&lang=en-US' && cd $R && tar -xvf $out && rm $out && cd -
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && rm -rf dist/* && rolldown build
scripts.dev: trap 'kill 0' EXIT; tsc --noEmit --watch & rolldown -c rolldown.config.ts build --watch & while ! [ -f ./dist/manifest.json ]; do :; done; web-ext run --verbose --reload --devtools -p ./firefox-dev/profile -f ./firefox-dev/firefox/firefox -s ./dist
